articles.title: 'Responsibility to protect Americans': Trump tells US Congress fighting with Iran has resumed
articles.description: US President Trump has updated Congress on the recommencement of military action against Iran, marking the beginning of a new sixty-day operational phase for US forces. This escalation follows reported attacks on commercial shipping, attributed to Iran's supposed violation of a ceasefire. In response, the US has carried out several strikes, while Democrats assess potential legal actions to enforce compliance from the administration.

articles.title: 'Govt doesn’t care about your life': Mahua Moitra urges Wangchuk to call off hunger strike
articles.description: Trinamool MP Mahua Moitra urged Sonam Wangchuk to end his hunger strike.  Wangchuk's fast against examination irregularities reached sixteen days.  Eminent citizens also appealed for the protesters to end their fast.  They expressed concern over the protesters' worsening health conditions.  Activists question the government's lack of dialogue with protesters.

articles.title: Team India look to shake off T20I hangover as road to ODI World Cup begins
articles.description: After a disastrous T20I tour, India begin their ODI World Cup build-up against England at Edgbaston. With injuries forcing changes, Shubman Gill's side will look to reset, test combinations and lean on the experience of Virat Kohli, Rohit Sharma and Jasprit Bumrah as preparations for the 2027 World Cup gather pace.
articles.full_text: It is very different. Our mindset is that the combination for our World Cup preparation and the wickets we will get in South Africa will be similar to what we will play on here. Players like these Harshit Rana and Nitish Kumar Reddy, we wanted them to play as many matches as possible before the World Cup, so that they would feel settled if they got the opportunity to play in the World Cup

articles.title: India launches UNSC campaign for 2028-29 term, Jaishankar unveils ‘SHANTI’ vision
articles.description: India officially launched its campaign for a United Nations Security Council seat. External affairs minister S Jaishankar highlighted the country's peacekeeping and development partnerships. India presented its SHANTI vision for global governance and cooperation among nations. The nation seeks support for its candidature amid a changing global landscape. India previously served eight terms as a non-permanent Security Council member.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Alec Baldwin's wife Hilaria Baldwin: "With breath on your side, you become alert and aware of what's really going on, not overtaken by…" - why one conscious breath can help you think more clearly
articles.description: Hilaria Baldwin suggests using breath for greater awareness and clarity. Conscious breathing creates a pause, allowing for observation instead of instinct. This pause helps overcome ego and old destructive patterns effectively. Modern research supports slower breathing for stress reduction and relaxation. This simple technique aids in making better decisions in daily life.

articles.title: Why did Tom Segura and Christina P separate after their 18-year marriage? Podcasters’ split details emerge
articles.description: Tom Segura and Christina P have reportedly separated after 18 years of marriage, according to TMZ. The news has surprised many fans who have followed the couple’s journey through comedy, podcasts and television projects. While the pair have remained largely private about the situation, reports suggest they will continue working together, leaving plenty of questions still unanswered.

articles.title: 9 European nations, Ukraine form an anti-ballistic missile coalition
articles.description: Nine European countries and Ukraine established a coalition for defensive anti-ballistic capabilities. This alliance aims to deter and defeat future missile threats effectively. The group will integrate defense industries, research, and operational experiences. Ukrainian President Zelensky attended a Paris meeting to reaffirm support for his nation. This initiative responds to growing ballistic missile threats and Ukraine's unique experiences.

articles.title: LeT, IS operatives among 34 killed in Khuzdar attack: BLA
articles.description: The Baloch Liberation Army claimed a major suicide attack on an ISIS-K commander's compound. This operation targeted a meeting coordinating efforts against the Baloch political movement. The BLA stated that 34 operatives, including ISIS and LeT members, were killed. The attack, executed by the Majeed Brigade, followed weeks of intelligence surveillance. This incident highlights alleged links between Pakistan's ISI and militant groups.

articles.title: HCLTech to up AI game, invest 3,500 crore in data centres of up to 50 MW
articles.description: HCLTech plans a significant investment in new AI data centers. This move targets growing demand for sovereign AI infrastructure. The company reported its first-quarter revenue figures on Monday. Revenue saw a slight sequential decrease but a year-over-year increase. This investment follows HCLTech's recent stake in Sarvam AI.

articles.title: Supreme Court appoints ex-judge Rao to mediate Kalyani family feud
articles.description: The Supreme Court appointed a retired judge to mediate a family dispute. This mediation concerns over one lakh crore rupees in assets between Baba Kalyani and his sister. The court gave the parties two weeks to attempt a settlement. Earlier, the Bombay High Court refused to send the dispute to mediation. The Supreme Court urged the parties to heed its request for mediation.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: KCET UGCET 2026 provisional first-round seat allotment result declared at cetonline.karnataka.gov.in; candidates can raise objections by 5 PM
articles.description: KEA seat allotment 2026: The Karnataka Examinations Authority has declared the UGCET 2026 first round provisional seat allotment result for admissions to professional courses, including Engineering. Candidates can check their allotment status on the official KEA website. Objections to the provisional result can be submitted by email until 5.00 pm on July 14, 2026. KEA will verify the representations before releasing the final first round seat allotment result and subsequent admission instructions.

articles.title: RBI Grade B prelims scorecards 2026 released at rbi.org.in: Direct link to download here
articles.description: The Reserve Bank of India has released the RBI Grade B Prelims Score Card 2026 and Phase 1 cut-off marks on its official website. Candidates can access their section-wise scores, overall marks and qualifying status using their login credentials. Those shortlisted must now prepare for the Phase 2 examination, scheduled to be held on July 25 and 26, 2026.

articles.title: JK High Court Junior Assistant admit card 2025 released at jkhighcourt.nic.in; download hall ticket for July 19 exam here
articles.description: The High Court of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh has released the Junior Assistant admit card for the written examination scheduled on July 19, 2026. Candidates can download the hall ticket from the official website using their Registration Number and Date of Birth. The article includes the direct download link, step-by-step instructions to access the admit card, documents required on the examination day, helpdesk details and important dates related to the recruitment process.

articles.title: RSCIT admit card 2026 released at vmou.ac.in for July and August exams; download hall ticket here
articles.description: RSCIT admit card 2026: VMOU, Kota has released the RSCIT admit cards for candidates appearing in the July and August 2026 examination cycle. Candidates scheduled for the July 19 and August 2 exams can download their hall tickets from the official Permission Letter portal using their login credentials. The article includes the direct download link, step-by-step instructions to access the admit card, alternative download options through IT Gyan Kendras, required documents and the RSCIT examination pattern.

articles.title: All about Sam Neill’s last interview
articles.description: The legendary actor Sam Neill has died at the age of seventy-eight. Known for his iconic role in Jurassic Park, Neill reflected on his experiences in his final interviews. He also spoke fondly of the quirky names he gave his farm animals. Following a courageous battle against stage three blood cancer, his family announced that he passed away peacefully, surrounded by loved ones.

articles.title: Lexie Levin drops out of SAINT SATINE ahead of debut
articles.description: In a surprising turn of events, Lexie Levin has announced her exit from SAINT SATINE, the much-anticipated girl group, ahead of their debut. After thorough discussions between Levin and the agency, they mutually agreed on this decision. Levin attributed her departure to differences in operational approaches. Previously, she had also exited the 'Dream Academy' show to dedicate herself to music production.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay's adorable toy car moment goes viral
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay's playful interaction with a miniature electric car has captured public attention. This adorable moment occurred during a meeting with officials from VinFast, a Vietnamese electric vehicle maker. The viral clip shows Vijay examining the tiny car with a warm smile, delighting his fans. Meanwhile, anticipation for his upcoming film 'Jana Nayagan' continues to grow among audiences.

articles.title: 'Idhayam Murali' BO day 4: Atharvaa's film surpasses Rs 15 crore
articles.description: Idhayam Murali collected Rs 15.81 crore worldwide after four days. The romantic drama saw a dip on its first Monday after a decent weekend. Family audiences and youngsters have been drawn to its lighthearted storytelling and music. Fahadh Faasil's special cameo is also a talking point among moviegoers. Positive reviews are supporting the film during weekdays and encouraging its run.
